Setup & Info
How this works
GitHub Actions scrapes 13 companies daily at 07:00 UTC
Claude AI scores each role against Pedro's CV (0–100)
Results are committed to docs/data.json and published via GitHub Pages
Scores ≥ 65 = Strong Match · ≥ 50 = Good Match · ≥ 30 = Partial Match
Unscored jobs appear with a grey "?" — they'll be scored on the next daily run
Score Breakdown
Skills (0–40): Technical & delivery skill match
Seniority (0–30): Director/Head/VP level alignment
Sector (0–20): IB/AM/Fintech domain match
Language (0–10): Portuguese + English fit
